hero.headline: Turn Your Expertise Into Income
hero.subheadline: Create a course once. Build a teaching network. Earn forever.
hero.description: Unlike other platforms where you teach every student yourself, Peerloop lets you build a team of certified tutors who deliver your course while you earn royalties.

points.title: You Create, They Deliver
points.description: Design your curriculum once. Your certified Student-Teachers handle the 1-on-1 instruction.

points.title: Build Your Teaching Army
points.description: Top students become tutors for your course. As demand grows, so does your tutor pool—automatically.

points.title: Dual Revenue Streams
points.description: Earn 85% from course sales AND 15% royalties on every tutoring session. Income that compounds over time.

points.title: Focus on What Matters
points.description: No scheduling headaches, no live sessions to run. Create great content and let the platform handle the rest.

steps.title: Design Your Course
steps.description: Use our course builder to create curriculum with videos, assignments, and assessments. No coding required.

steps.title: Set Your Price
steps.description: Choose your course price. You keep 85% of every sale—higher than most platforms.

steps.title: Certify Your Tutors
steps.description: When students excel, recommend them for certification. A brief video interview and they're ready to teach.

steps.title: Earn Ongoing Royalties
steps.description: Every time a Student-Teacher runs a session for your course, you earn 15%. Forever.

streams.description: One-time revenue when students purchase your course
Ongoing revenue from every tutoring session

calculator.title: Estimate Your Earnings
calculator.note: Based on 50 new students/month with 5 tutoring hours each

tools.name: Course Builder
tools.description: Drag-and-drop curriculum design with video, text, and assessments

successStories.name: Dr. Maya Rodriguez
successStories.testimonial: I was skeptical about peer teaching, but my Student-Teachers often get better feedback than I did teaching live. And I earn while I sleep.

successStories.name: James Chen
successStories.testimonial: The session royalties add up fast. I created one comprehensive course and now have 60+ tutors teaching it. Best passive income I've ever built.

faq.question: Do I need to teach students myself?
faq.answer: No! You create the curriculum and certify Student-Teachers. They handle the 1-on-1 instruction. You can teach if you want, but it's not required.

faq.question: How do I certify Student-Teachers?
faq.answer: When a student completes your course with high marks, their tutor can recommend them. You then have a brief video call to verify their knowledge and approve certification.

faq.question: What if no one signs up to be a tutor?
faq.answer: We actively encourage top students to become tutors. The 70% commission rate is very attractive. Most popular courses have a waiting list of tutor applicants.

faq.question: How much support do I get?
faq.answer: We provide course design consultation, marketing support, and a dedicated creator success manager for courses with 100+ students.

finalCta.headline: Ready to Build Your Course Empire?
finalCta.subheadline: Join creators earning passive income while changing lives.
